citations.detail: This rule is the challenge pack's own frozen convention. Its source is a file inside this repository (pack/rules/RULES_README.md, which is present), and its issuer is the pack itself, so re-fetching it would be us reading back what we wrote. Not counted as verified and not counted as failed.
